series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on employees relating to medical history, disability and FMLA. Records may include: Medical Forms, Disability Leave Cards, Application for Disability, Leave Benefits, Application for Disability Leave, Employer Statement, Supplemental Report, Physician or Health Care Provider Certification for FMLA, Disability approval and leaves, and any other record or supporting document relating to medical history, disability and FMLA.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) state fiscal years employment terminates. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record. ; Electronic: five (5) state fiscal years employment terminates. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record
